body:0002.source: Unlike standard ideation projects, proposals and petitions are bottom-up contributions initiated by citizens themselves.
body:0002.target: Unlike standard ideation projects, proposals and petitions are bottom-up contributions initiated by citizens themselves.

body:0003.source: Citizens can submit proposals at any time.
body:0003.target: Citizens can submit proposals at any time.

body:0004.source: Proposals gather support via votes and/or cosponsors.
body:0004.target: Proposals gather support via votes and/or cosponsors.

body:0005.source: When proposals meet the defined threshold, they receive an official response.
body:0005.target: When proposals meet the defined threshold, they receive an official response.

body:0006.source: This method helps governments track what citizens find important, fill policy gaps, and strengthen participatory democracy.
body:0006.target: This method helps governments track what citizens find important, fill policy gaps, and strengthen participatory democracy.

body:0008.source: Reaching the threshold signals a promise between residents and your organization. To maintain credibility:
body:0008.target: Reaching the threshold signals a promise between residents and your organization. To maintain credibility:

body:0009.source: Communicate expectations in the project description
body:0009.target: Communicate expectations in the project description

body:0010.source: Ensure resources (time, staff, budget) are available to follow through
body:0010.target: Ensure resources (time, staff, budget) are available to follow through

body:0012.source: Determine how you will follow up with resident proposals. Some examples include:
body:0012.target: Determine how you will follow up with resident proposals. Some examples include:

body:0013.source: Invite author(s) to present at a council meeting
body:0013.target: Invite author(s) to present at a council meeting

body:0014.source: Provide advice or refer internally to the right department
body:0014.target: Provide advice or refer internally to the right department

body:0015.source: Offer financial or communicational support based on your insights
body:0015.target: Offer financial or communicational support based on your insights

body:0017.source: Use statuses (e.g., Threshold Reached, Answered) and official updates in the Input Manager so supporters see, and are notified of, next steps.
body:0017.target: Use statuses (e.g., Threshold Reached, Answered) and official updates in the Input Manager so supporters see, and are notified of, next steps.

body:0018.source: How to set up a proposal/petition?
body:0018.target: How to set up a proposal/petition?

body:0020.source: Create a new project and name it for example: “Proposals” or “Petitions”
body:0020.target: Create a new project and name it for example: “Proposals” or “Petitions”

body:0021.source: In the Setup phase, select Proposals, petitions, or initiatives as the participation method
body:0021.target: In the Setup phase, select Proposals, petitions, or initiatives as the participation method

body:0022.source: Customize the description to explain goals, rules, and submission criteria
body:0022.target: Customize the description to explain goals, rules, and submission criteria

body:0024.source: Eligibility criteria help filter relevant proposals. Common criteria:
body:0024.target: Eligibility criteria help filter relevant proposals. Common criteria:

body:0026.source: Serves common interest, not personal gain
body:0026.target: Serves common interest, not personal gain

body:0029.source: Not already covered by an existing plan or duplicate of another proposal
body:0029.target: Not already covered by an existing plan or duplicate of another proposal

body:0030.source: Communicate these criteria in the project description.
body:0030.target: Communicate these criteria in the project description.

body:0032.source: Define the conditions under which a proposal qualifies for response.
body:0032.target: Define the conditions under which a proposal qualifies for response.

body:0034.source: Days to reach threshold: typically ~90 days (balance between urgency and opportunity)
body:0034.target: Days to reach threshold: typically ~90 days (balance between urgency and opportunity)

body:0036.source: User anonymity: Hide participant identity if allowed
body:0036.target: User anonymity: Hide participant identity if allowed

body:0037.source: Review of proposals: Enable “Require screening of inputs” to approve before publishing
body:0037.target: Review of proposals: Enable “Require screening of inputs” to approve before publishing

body:0038.source: Cosponsorship: Require cosponsors for legitimacy. Cosponsors must be invited and accept before the proposal goes public
body:0038.target: Cosponsorship: Require cosponsors for legitimacy. Cosponsors must be invited and accept before the proposal goes public

body:0040.source: You can choose from 3 different views on how you want your proposals to appear: List, Map or Feed.
body:0040.target: You can choose from 3 different views on how you want your proposals to appear: List, Map or Feed.

body:0041.source: To learn more on each of these views and how to set them up you can read more about it here
body:0041.target: To learn more on each of these views and how to set them up you can read more about it here

body:0043.source: Customize the submission form for proposals:
body:0043.target: Customize the submission form for proposals:

body:0046.source: Cosponsorship and anonymity fields appear if enabled
body:0046.target: Cosponsorship and anonymity fields appear if enabled

body:0047.source: Use multiple pages and an end page to provide process information
body:0047.target: Use multiple pages and an end page to provide process information

body:0048.source: Similar Input Detection can be enabled to reduce duplicates
body:0048.target: Similar Input Detection can be enabled to reduce duplicates

body:0050.source: Use statuses to communicate progress and manage proposals internally. We separate automatic and manual statuses depending on how you configured your project, see below the differences of each status and what they mean
body:0050.target: Use statuses to communicate progress and manage proposals internally. We separate automatic and manual statuses depending on how you configured your project, see below the differences of each status and what they mean

body:0054.source: Threshold Reached: gathered enough support in time
body:0054.target: Threshold Reached: gathered enough support in time

body:0057.source: Ineligible: doesn’t meet criteria, cannot be voted on.
body:0057.target: Ineligible: doesn’t meet criteria, cannot be voted on.

body:0058.source: Answered: reached threshold and response is published.
body:0058.target: Answered: reached threshold and response is published.

body:0059.source: Custom statuses: Create in Platform settings → Input statuses. Define name, color, and function.
body:0059.target: Custom statuses: Create in Platform settings → Input statuses. Define name, color, and function.

body:0060.source: How to make your proposals visible?
body:0060.target: How to make your proposals visible?

body:0061.source: To emphasize your proposals/petitions you can pin them in the navigation bar and/or highlight them on the homepage.
body:0061.target: To emphasize your proposals/petitions you can pin them in the navigation bar and/or highlight them on the homepage.

body:0062.source: Navigation bar: Go to Pages & Menu → Add project to navbar.
body:0062.target: Navigation bar: Go to Pages & Menu → Add project to navbar.

body:0063.source: Homepage: Go to Pages & Menu → Edit Home → Spotlight widget.
body:0063.target: Homepage: Go to Pages & Menu → Edit Home → Spotlight widget.

body:0064.source: How to moderate and manage proposals?
body:0064.target: How to moderate and manage proposals?

body:0065.source: Use the project-level Input Manager to assign, update, and respond to proposals.
body:0065.target: Use the project-level Input Manager to assign, update, and respond to proposals.

body:0066.source: Assign default or individual assignees via Project General tab → Access rights or in the Input Manager of the timeline.
body:0066.target: Assign default or individual assignees via Project General tab → Access rights or in the Input Manager of the timeline.

body:0067.source: Change statuses (automatic or manual). Status changes trigger email notifications for followers.
body:0067.target: Change statuses (automatic or manual). Status changes trigger email notifications for followers.

body:0068.source: Add internal comments for private admin discussions.
body:0068.target: Add internal comments for private admin discussions.

body:0069.source: ⚠️ Proposals only appear in project-level Input Manager, not in the platform-level one. You cannot move proposals from phase to phase.
body:0069.target: ⚠️ Proposals only appear in project-level Input Manager, not in the platform-level one. You cannot move proposals from phase to phase.
